_comment: Exact host city for each of the 6 group matches, in PAIRS order [(0,1),(0,2),(0,3),(1,2),(1,3),(2,3)] where 0..3 are the teams in groups.json order. Source: Wikipedia per-group pages + FIFA/ESPN/MLS schedule. Only altitude-relevant (A,K) and host (B,D) groups encoded exactly; other groups fall back to cluster-average venue conditions.
